{{Quote|Are you just going to sit there, or are you going to come out and play?|Lena Missa to Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy|<ref name="YDR" />}}
'''Lena Missa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Chagrian/Legends|Chagrian]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] who learned at the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order's]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Temple]] [[Jedi academy|academy]] located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]], during the last [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Missa had a [[Lena Missa's Jedi Master|Jedi Master]] who accepted her as their Padawan before [[Death/Legends|perishing]] in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]]. A year [[19 BBY/Legends|later]], Missa participated in the [[Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament]] organized by Master [[Ilena Xan]]. She made it to the Round of Eight alongside her friend [[Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy]] but was forced to yield after being defeated by [[Whie Malreaux/Legends|Whie Malreaux]].

==Biography==
Lenna Missa was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Chagrian/Legends|Chagrian]] who was born around [[34 BBY/Legends|34 BBY]]. She underwent [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Temple]] [[Jedi academy|academy]] and was chosen as a [[Padawan]] by a [[Lena Missa's Jedi Master|Jedi Master]]. When her Master [[Death/Legends|died]] in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], Missa went through a grieving period that prevented a number of other [[Jedi Master/Legends|Masters]] from outright choosing her as their own Padawan.<ref name="YDR" />

In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Missa was one of the participants in Master [[Ilena Xan]]'s annual [[Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament]]. She bested the two opponents paired with her in the initial rounds, making her eligible to the Round of Eight. She outlasted five other combatants before surrendering to [[Whie Malreaux/Legends|Whie Malreaux]] when he subdued her with a wrist lock that forced her thumb at an awkward angle. Harboring no ill feelings towards Malreaux, Missa answered his bow with a curtsy and a laugh.<ref name="YDR" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Vindictive stuck-up Arkanian prig. She's just mad because you beat her, fair and square.|Lena Missa about Hanna Ding, to Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy|<ref name="YDR" />}}
Lena Missa was well liked by her peers and considered as witty. She had a very deft touch with the Force and after her Jedi Master died, several Jedi Masters sought for the right to choose her as their Padawan once the appropriate grieving period was over.<ref name="YDR" />

==Equipment==
Missa wielded a lightsaber containing a blue [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|crystal]].<ref name="YDR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Lena Missa first appeared in ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'', a novel written by [[Sean Stewart]] and published in [[2004]].<ref name="YDR" />

The exact year of the death of Missa's Master has conflicting versions. In ''Dark Rendezvous'', her master was said to have died in 20 BBY, a year before the Apprentice Tournament. However, according to ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published in [[2008]], her master was killed in the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]] which occurred in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|II|319|Missa, Lena}}</ref>
